one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Pesakastew Solar Limited Partnership (25.5% interest) developing 10 MW solar farm in Saskatchewan with SaskPower agreement, completed subsequent to year end. FHQ Casino Holdings Ltd. (8.3% interest) holds rental property. Bingo hall permanently ceased operations January 14, 2022. Management Action Plan agreement with ISC in place. Drinking water advisory class action settlement eligible.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Province is Saskatchewan. Five consolidated subsidiaries: Star Blanket Cree Nation CMHC Housing Program, White Buffalo Calf Gaming Authority, Star Blanket Rentals, Red Dog Holdings Ltd., Red Dog Holdings Limited Partnership. Star Blanket Treaty Land Entitlement Trust excluded from consolidation. Pesakastew Solar LP loan guarantee up to $17M not recorded as liability. Drinking water settlement contingent asset not valued. Management Action Plan with ISC in place. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($6,230,882) + CMHC ($140,712) + Investing in Canada Infrastructure Program ($185,958) + FHQ Tribal Council ($251,712) = $6,809,264; osr = $8,453,582 - $6,809,264 = $1,644,318. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text so remuneration fields are 0. expenses_salaries_total not determinable from provided text.
